title: Task 01: Add AST API in @shelkovo/markdown with package tests
description: Artifact: docs/tasks/markdown-ast-generation/01-package-markdown-ast-api.md. Implement the shared @shelkovo/markdown AST generation API only: dependencies, generate module, exports, package README, and focused tests for frontmatter, GFM table, nested list, parsed Markdown fragment, and escaping. Acceptance: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/markdown test and pnpm --filter @shelkovo/markdown typecheck pass; update task status to Выполнено and commit atomically after completion.

title: Task 02: Migrate news Markdown to AST API
description: Artifact: docs/tasks/markdown-ast-generation/02-migrate-news-markdown.md. Migrate apps/www news companion Markdown generators to @shelkovo/markdown AST API, including package frontmatter and parseMarkdownFragment for article/addenda bodies. Acceptance: buildNews*Markdown functions use package AST generation; public links/frontmatter/body semantics are preserved; update news tests; run pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/news/markdown.test.ts and pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck; mark the task file Выполнено and commit atomically.

title: Task 03: Migrate status Markdown to AST API
description: Artifact: docs/tasks/markdown-ast-generation/03-migrate-status-markdown.md. Migrate apps/www status companion Markdown generators to @shelkovo/markdown AST API, including package frontmatter and parseMarkdownFragment for incident bodies. Acceptance: buildStatus*Markdown functions use package AST generation; public links/frontmatter/status metadata semantics are preserved; update status tests; run pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/status/markdown.test.ts and pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck; mark the task file Выполнено and commit atomically.

title: Task 04: Migrate people Markdown to AST API
description: Artifact: docs/tasks/markdown-ast-generation/04-migrate-people-markdown.md. Migrate people overview and detail Markdown generation to @shelkovo/markdown AST API, including parseMarkdownFragment for profile bodies. Acceptance: buildPeopleHomeMarkdown and buildPersonMarkdown use package AST generation; contacts/backlinks remain Markdown links; update people tests; run pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/people and pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck; mark the task file Выполнено and commit atomically.

title: Task 05: Migrate reglament overview and full Markdown to AST API
description: Artifact: docs/tasks/markdown-ast-generation/05-migrate-reglament-overview-full.md. Migrate reglament overview and full Markdown generators to @shelkovo/markdown AST API. Acceptance: buildReglamentMarkdown and buildFullReglament*Markdown use package AST generation; source refs, thematic links, ids, and inline code remain machine-readable; update or add focused tests; run pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/reglament and pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck; mark the task file Выполнено and commit atomically.

title: Task 06: Migrate reglament detail Markdown to AST API
description: Artifact: docs/tasks/markdown-ast-generation/06-migrate-reglament-detail.md. Migrate reglament detail Markdown generators to @shelkovo/markdown AST API, preferably after Task 05 style is available. Acceptance: all buildEstimateDetail*Markdown functions use package AST generation; source labels and quote items remain readable; no local whole-document Markdown serializer; update focused tests/snapshots; run pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/reglament/detail-markdown.test.ts and pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck; mark the task file Выполнено and commit atomically.

title: Task 07: Migrate Compare Markdown to AST API
description: Artifact: docs/tasks/markdown-ast-generation/07-migrate-compare-markdown.md. Migrate /815/compare Markdown generators to @shelkovo/markdown AST API. Acceptance: buildHomeMd, buildRatingMd, and buildSettlementMd use package AST generation; discovery links stay under /815/compare/; source lists and settlement facts remain readable; update Compare tests; run pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/compare/lib/markdown.test.ts and pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck; mark the task file Выполнено and commit atomically.

title: Task 08: Migrate section llms to AST API
description: Artifact: docs/tasks/markdown-ast-generation/08-migrate-section-llms.md. Migrate news, status, and people llms.txt / llms-full.txt generators to @shelkovo/markdown AST API. Acceptance: apps/www/src/lib/news/llms.ts, apps/www/src/lib/status/llms.ts, and apps/www/src/lib/people/llms.ts use package AST generation; .txt routes/content type/public URLs/feed/schema/OpenAPI/example links keep their agent-facing meaning; update discovery/llms tests with snapshots where rendered Markdown text is asserted; run pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/news src/lib/status src/lib/people and pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck; mark the task file Выполнено and commit atomically.

title: Task 09: Migrate root, reglament, and compare llms to AST API
description: Artifact: docs/tasks/markdown-ast-generation/09-migrate-root-reglament-compare-llms.md. Migrate root, reglament, and Compare llms.txt / llms-full.txt generators to @shelkovo/markdown AST API after Task 08. Acceptance: apps/www/src/lib/llms.ts, apps/www/src/lib/reglament/llms.ts, and apps/www/src/compare/lib/llms.ts use package AST generation; .txt routes/content type/public URLs/feed/schema/OpenAPI/skills/example links keep their agent-facing meaning; update discovery/llms tests with snapshots where rendered Markdown text is asserted; run pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/llms.test.ts src/lib/reglament src/compare/lib and pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck; mark the task file Выполнено and commit atomically.

title: Task 10: Cleanup old Markdown helpers and run final verification
description: Artifact: docs/tasks/markdown-ast-generation/10-cleanup-and-final-verification.md. Finish the Markdown AST migration cleanup: check whether apps/www/src/lib/markdown/frontmatter.ts is still needed and remove or document it, remove stale frontmatter imports, update packages/markdown/README.md if generation API docs are incomplete, review AGENTS.md and apps/www/AGENTS.md for concise Markdown generation guidance, find public Markdown/llms generators still serializing whole documents through manual line arrays and either migrate or explicitly document justified exceptions. Acceptance: old app frontmatter helper removed or justified; package docs explain render-vs-generate API; no public Markdown/llms whole-document generators use lines.join('\n') or equivalent local serializers without documented exception; ADR-008 and task README match implementation; run pnpm --filter @shelkovo/markdown test, pnpm --filter @shelkovo/markdown typecheck, pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test, pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck, and pnpm build or record a clear blocker; mark the task file Выполнено and commit atomically.
